scripts.lint: NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 eslint app components lib hooks store proxy.ts
scripts.cf:build: npm install --include=dev && cross-env NODE_ENV=production opennextjs-cloudflare build
scripts.cf:check-public-env: node -e "const r=['NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL','NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY'].filter(k=>!process.env[k]); if(r.length){console.error('Missing required build-time env vars: '+r.join(', '));process.exit(1)}"
scripts.cf:deploy:dev: npm run cf:check-public-env && opennextjs-cloudflare build && opennextjs-cloudflare deploy -- --env dev
scripts.cf:deploy:staging: npm run cf:check-public-env && opennextjs-cloudflare build && opennextjs-cloudflare deploy -- --env staging
scripts.cf:deploy:prod: npm run cf:check-public-env && opennextjs-cloudflare build && opennextjs-cloudflare deploy -- --env production
scripts.cf:deploy:production: npm run cf:check-public-env && opennextjs-cloudflare build && opennextjs-cloudflare deploy -- --env production
scripts.cf:deploy:cron:dev: cd workers/cron && npx wrangler deploy --env dev
scripts.cf:deploy:cron:staging: cd workers/cron && npx wrangler deploy --env staging
scripts.cf:deploy:cron:prod: cd workers/cron && npx wrangler deploy --env production
scripts.audit: npm run audit:security && npm run audit:perf
